resultList.dtldesc: Semi-Furnished Independent House for Sale in Avadi, Chennai::::Set within a well-established residential neighbourhood of Avadi, Chennai, this thoughtfully planned semi-furnished independent house offers comfortable family living with a practical layout and Vaastu-compliant design. The property is north-facing and developed across a ground plus one floor configuration, making it suitable for families seeking a private home with well-defined living spaces and good connectivity to key parts of the city.::::Property Specifications::::The house is constructed in a G plus 1 floor layout and is connected internally through a staircase. The ground floor comprises a drawing room, living room, pooja room, kitchen with dining area, service veranda, and one bedroom with an attached western-style bathroom. The first floor includes one bedroom with an attached bathroom, providing privacy and functional separation of spaces. The total built-up area is approximately 1243 sq. ft, with vitrified tile flooring used uniformly across the house. The property is semi-furnished with wardrobes in the bedrooms and a fully modular kitchen fitted with cabinets, chimney, granite platform, and stainless steel sink. Piped gas connection is available. Both bathrooms are fitted with geysers and modern fixtures. Electrical fittings such as lights and fans are installed throughout the house. There are no balconies in the property.::::Facilities::::The house offers a covered car parking facility for convenient vehicle storage. Power backup is available up to fifty percent, with additional provision for installing an inverter if required. The property does not form part of a gated society and therefore does not include common amenities such as clubhouse or swimming pool. Security services and CCTV installation are not provided, allowing owners the flexibility to implement personalised security solutions as per preference.::::Locality::::Avadi is a well-connected and rapidly developing residential locality in Chennai, offering easy access to schools, healthcare facilities, markets, and transport hubs. Nearby educational institutions include Nasrat School, Velammal Vidhyalaya, Vivekananda Vidhayalaya, Everwin School, and SA Engineering College. Daily necessities can be accessed at Avadi Market and Ponnu Stores, while medical facilities include Avadi Government Hospital and Mehta Hospital. The area is well served by public transport, with Avadi Railway Station and Poonamallee Metro Station providing convenient connectivity across the city and suburbs through buses and trains, ensuring smooth daily commuting.
